2980.one_line_summary: Swiss-law-compliant asset token with whitelist/frozenlist restrictions extending ERC-20.
2980.notes: Specifies security-token mechanics for regulated asset issuance; overlaps with fungible tokens but primary purpose is RWA compliance.

2981.one_line_summary: Standardized royalty payment mechanism for NFTs via royaltyInfo interface.
2981.notes: Universal standard works with 721, 1155, and any asset type; enables secondary-market royalty enforcement.

3000.one_line_summary: Optimistic enactment governance standard with schedule/execute/challenge/resolve pattern.
3000.notes: Designed for off-chain governance with on-chain challenge/response mechanics; infrastructure for DAO execution.

3005.one_line_summary: Batched meta-transaction extension for ERC-20 enabling gasless multi-sender token transfers.
3005.notes: Reduces relayer gas costs; not DeFi-specific, focuses on token transfer mechanism extension.

3009.one_line_summary: ERC-20 meta-transaction extension using EIP-712 signatures for atomic transfers and approvals.
3009.notes: Random nonces, valid-after/valid-before windows; complements ERC-2612 with different nonce model.

3135.one_line_summary: Exclusive claimable token for micropayment channels via signed off-chain messages.
3135.notes: Primary use: payment systems and micropayments; extends ERC-20 with deposit/claim/withdraw mechanics.

3156.one_line_summary: Standard interfaces and process for single-asset flash loans with lender/borrower callback pattern.
3156.notes: Core DeFi primitive; specifies flashFee, maxFlashLoan, and onFlashLoan callback mechanics.

3224.one_line_summary: Compute human-readable descriptions for signable data via eipXXXDescribe contract methods.
3224.notes: Wallet UX enhancement; allows dApps to provide meaningful signing descriptions without malicious contract protection.

3234.one_line_summary: Batch flash loans for simultaneous multi-asset lending via standard lender/borrower interfaces.
3234.notes: Extends single-asset ERC-3156 to multi-token case; use case: simultaneous platform refinancing.

3386.one_line_summary: Wrapper converting ERC-721/ERC-1155 NFTs to fungible ERC-20 derivative tokens via pooling.
3386.notes: Primary purpose is NFT fractionalization; secondary fungible aspect via derivative tokens.

3440.one_line_summary: ERC-721 editions extension enabling artists to designate originals and sign limited editions.
3440.notes: ERC-712 signed provenance for digital art; limited-edition print management with immutable signatures.

3448.one_line_summary: Minimal bytecode proxy standard supporting immutable metadata attachment to proxy contracts.
3448.notes: Low-level proxy pattern; enables metadata discovery without separate storage; used by factory patterns.

3450.one_line_summary: Standardized Shamir secret sharing scheme for splitting BIP-39 mnemonics into recoverable shares.
3450.notes: Key management utility; applies Shamir's in GF(256) to mnemonic entropy; T-of-N threshold recovery.

3475.one_line_summary: Abstract storage bonds standard with configurable metadata, multiple nonces, and batch issuance/redemption.
3475.notes: Tokenized obligations with complex redemption logic; primary purpose is DeFi bonds; compatible with 20/721/1155.

3525.one_line_summary: Semi-fungible token combining ERC-721 identity with ERC-20 value via slot-based fungibility model.
3525.notes: Tokens with same SLOT are fungible on value; bridges NFT qualitative attributes with fungible quantitative features.
